text: 2273 - وَمَا مِنْ سَفَرٍ أَبْلَغُ فِي لَحْمٍ وَلَا دَمٍ وَلَا جِلْدٍ وَلَا شَعْرٍ مِنْ سَفَرِ مَكَّةَ، وَمَا مِنْ أَحَدٍ يُبْلِغُهُ حَتَّى تَلْحَقَهُ الْمَشَقَّةُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2273 - "There is no journey that affects the flesh, blood, skin, or hair more profoundly than the journey to Makkah, and no one completes it without enduring hardship."
